# Unwavering Resolve
## Scripture
"And let us not grow weary of doing good, for in due season we will reap, if we do not give up." – Galatians 6:9
## Reflection
As men, we often face challenges that test our resolve and push us to our limits. We may feel like giving up, like our efforts are futile and that we're not making progress. But the Bible tells us to "not grow weary of doing good." This means we must be determined and unwavering in our pursuit of righteousness, even when it's hard. We must trust that God is working everything out for our good, even when we can't see it.

In the midst of difficulties, we must draw on the strength of Christ, who endured the cross for the joy set before Him (Hebrews 12:2). We must fix our eyes on Him and remember that He has overcome the world (John 16:33). As warriors of Christ, we must be resolute in our faith, refusing to give up or lose heart.

## Daily Challenge
"Do 20 squats while declaring, 'I will not give up, for I am a warrior of Christ.'"
